title: Mindful Briny Vietnamese Tofu Bun Cha
description: A one-pot Vietnamese dish featuring crispy tofu and a sweet and savory briny sauce, served with rice noodles and fresh herbs. This recipe is shojin-friendly and can be made with a double-fry method for extra crispy tofu.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu cubes and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Remove the tofu from the pot and set aside on a paper towel-lined plate.
Add the soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar, salt, and black pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Bring the sauce to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the cooked rice noodles to the pot and stir to combine with the sauce.
Add the crispy tofu back to the pot and stir to combine with the noodles and sauce.
Stir in the vanilla extract and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the bun cha hot, garnished with chopped scallions.
